active_projects.completion_summary: Successfully ported comprehensive research paper content from paper_overview.md to Springer sn-jnl LaTeX template. Created 26-page PDF document with 9 sections covering programmatic methodology, modularity, finite model exploration, TheoryLib vision, Logos case study, implementation results, related work, and discussion. Includes 16 BibTeX references, ~40 custom notation macros, and Python code listings with syntax highlighting.
